rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Cobalt Strike Beacon Getsystem Pattern (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Cobalt Strike Beacon Getsystem Pattern (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 187c05df-debd-40ed-a59e-1163703bb1de
status: experimental
description: Detects command line pattern indicating the use of Cobalt Strike GetSystem
  feature. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/cobalt-strike/
- https://www.cobaltstrike.com/blog/what-happens-when-i-type-getsystem/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0154
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|re: ^.*echo\s+[0-9a-f]{11}\s+\>\;?\s+\\\\\.\\pipe\\[0-9a-f]{6}.*$
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
